entries.fallbackBehavior: Inspect `.hforge/runtime/index.json`, `.hforge/library/`, `.specify/state/flow-state.json`, and the generated flow docs directly.
entries.notes: Flow status and recovery are available for Claude Code workflows and should route through the hidden `.hforge/` AI layer rather than isolated target notes.

entries.fallbackBehavior: Use the CLI maintenance commands directly from the packaged runtime.
entries.notes: Claude Code is a first-class maintenance target.

entries.fallbackBehavior: Inspect .hforge/observability artifacts directly.
entries.notes: Local observability is available for Claude Code workflows.

entries.fallbackBehavior: Inspect `.hforge/runtime/index.json` and `.hforge/library/`, or run the intelligence scripts directly if the CLI is unavailable.
entries.notes: Repo intelligence is a first-class Claude Code surface and compiles into the hidden `.hforge/` AI layer.

entries.fallbackBehavior: Use CLAUDE.md, .agents/skills/, and the hidden .hforge AI layer.
entries.notes: Claude Code ships first-class guidance and runtime packaging.

entries.fallbackBehavior: Use the shipped hook catalog and runtime docs.
entries.notes: Claude Code has the strongest native hook story in the current package.

entries.fallbackBehavior: Run the package validators directly from the repository.
entries.notes: Workflow validation is available through the packaged validation bundle.
Codex does not ship bundle support for target-runtime:claude-code.

entries.fallbackBehavior: Inspect `.hforge/runtime/index.json`, `.hforge/library/`, `.specify/state/flow-state.json`, and the generated flow docs directly.
entries.notes: Flow status and recovery are available for Codex workflows and should route through the hidden `.hforge/` AI layer rather than isolated target notes.

entries.fallbackBehavior: Use the CLI maintenance commands directly from the packaged runtime.
entries.notes: Codex is a first-class maintenance target.

entries.fallbackBehavior: Inspect .hforge/observability artifacts directly.
entries.notes: Local observability is available for Codex workflows.

entries.fallbackBehavior: Inspect `.hforge/runtime/index.json` and `.hforge/library/`, or run the intelligence scripts directly if the CLI is unavailable.
entries.notes: Repo intelligence is a first-class Codex surface and compiles into the hidden `.hforge/` AI layer.

entries.fallbackBehavior: Use AGENTS.md, .agents/skills/, and the hidden .hforge AI layer.
entries.notes: Codex ships first-class guidance and runtime packaging.

entries.fallbackBehavior: Use the docs and packaged hook manifests as references, then wire execution manually in the Codex target.
entries.notes: Codex ships hook authoring guidance, but not the same native runtime hook model as Claude Code.

entries.fallbackBehavior: Run the package validators directly from the repository.
entries.notes: Codex can consume the shipped workflow validation surfaces.

entries.fallbackBehavior: Do not rely on packaged flow recovery for Cursor; use `.hforge/runtime/index.json` and the thin bridge surfaces only.
entries.notes: No first-class Cursor flow-state recovery surface is shipped beyond the hidden `.hforge/` runtime summary and bridge surfaces.

entries.fallbackBehavior: Run the maintenance commands from the repository rather than expecting Cursor-specific runtime integration.
entries.notes: Maintenance guidance is portable, but a Cursor-native runtime surface is not shipped.

entries.fallbackBehavior: Inspect the local observability artifacts directly from the repository.
entries.notes: Observability artifacts are portable, but no native Cursor runtime surface is shipped.

entries.fallbackBehavior: Inspect `.hforge/runtime/index.json` and `.hforge/library/`, then run the intelligence scripts directly and treat the output as operator guidance.
entries.notes: Repo intelligence is available as thin bridges, portable scripts, and generated hidden `.hforge/` state rather than a native Cursor runtime surface.

entries.fallbackBehavior: Use generated docs and manifests as the support surface instead of expecting a native Cursor runtime install.
entries.notes: Cursor can consume packaged docs and portable guidance, but not a first-class runtime mapping.

entries.fallbackBehavior: Use hook docs as references only; do not claim native Cursor hook execution.
entries.notes: Cursor does not have a packaged native hook runtime in this repository.

entries.fallbackBehavior: Run the validators from the repository rather than relying on a Cursor-specific runtime integration.
entries.notes: Validation guidance is portable, but no Cursor-native runtime wiring is shipped.
